<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 76 95 48 48]>Gyah! You startled me...

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>That's right!<unk[5:1]> The <Color=red>bright core<Color=white> of this
gigantic tree<unk[5:0]> has the sacred power to <Color=red>heal
vitality lost<Color=white> to gloom...<unk[5:0]>or so they say.
But when I got here, the light was weak.<unk[5:0]>
It wasn't able to heal anything at all, until
just now.
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 48]>I was watching, you know.<unk[5:1]> It was you.


You lit up this tree, didn't you, Link?<unk[5:0]>
It feels like something the archenemy
of the Yiga Clan would do.
As does being fooled by my disguise!
